summary.intent: Add regression tests and e2e tests for a self-improvement/memory feature branch, then fix PR review comments before merging.
summary.outcome: Tests were added across config, prompt builder, and silent turn layers plus an e2e spec; three Greptile PR comments were fixed (YAML quoting, stream_only guard, config re-read) and the branch was pushed clean.

repo: Structs using #[derive(Default)] silently zero-initialize bool fields to false, which breaks upgrade paths where absent fields should default to true — manual Default impls are required for those cases.
Periodic extraction runs inside send_impl's spawn block and must guard on stream_only to avoid firing in stream-only contexts.
Session summary handler should use state.config rather than re-reading config from disk via discover_and_load().
YAML frontmatter description values must be quoted to handle special characters safely.
The project lacks integration test infrastructure (mock gateway + providers + session stores), so deeply embedded runtime wiring is untested by design.

code.finding: update_frontmatter_description must quote YAML values to handle special characters
Periodic extraction spawn block needs a stream_only guard; stream_only is in scope in this file
Was incorrectly calling discover_and_load() instead of using state.config
Test assertions for patched/updated descriptions needed updating to expect YAML-quoted output after the quoting fix

workflow: Greptile automated review caught real bugs (YAML quoting, stream_only guard, config re-read) that unit tests did not cover.
Running cargo fmt, cargo check, and clippy before committing caught issues before push.

friction: The previous push was already complete before the user asked to commit and push, causing a redundant confirmation step.
Test assertions in crud_write.rs required a second pass after the YAML quoting fix to align expected output.
open_items: Integration test infrastructure (mock gateway with providers and session stores) is needed to cover prefetch inside run_with_tools/streaming, periodic extraction spawn block, and session summary RPC handler — intentionally deferred as out of scope for this branch.
PR #803 was updated with fixes but final merge approval/merge is not shown in the transcript.
